dict.string: Polenta Meeting Notes records the sound of your online calls so the other participants can be transcribed. Nothing leaves this Mac.
Polenta Meeting Notes records your microphone so you and anyone in the room can be transcribed. Nothing leaves this Mac.

Polenta Meeting Notes reads your calendar, on this Mac only, to offer to record when a meeting is due and to suggest attendee names for the voices it hears. It never changes anything in your calendar.
